crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update heartbeat, check inbox, and continue the highest priority research-agent task. When finished, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire heartbeat --interval 4h

crons.name: daily-research-brief
crons.prompt: Create a task for this daily research brief run, mark it in_progress, then run the daily research brief agent workflow: read .claude/skills/source-collection/SKILL.md, .claude/skills/signal-scoring/SKILL.md, .claude/skills/brief-generation/SKILL.md, and .claude/skills/delivery-routing/SKILL.md. Use the skills as the runtime instructions to collect configured sources, score signals, write research/output/YYYY-MM-DD artifacts, and route delivery through the configured approval-safe path. If delivery creates an approval, block the run task on the approval ID. When finished or blocked, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire daily-research-brief --interval "0 9 * * *"

crons.name: topic-briefing
crons.prompt: Create a task for this topic briefing run, mark it in_progress, then run the topic briefing agent workflow: ensure recent signals exist, then read .claude/skills/topic-briefing/SKILL.md and generate research/topic-briefings/YYYY-MM-DD/options.md plus detail files. Send or hold the compact options through delivery-routing according to approval settings. If delivery creates an approval, block the run task on the approval ID. When finished or blocked, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire topic-briefing --interval "0 18 * * *"

crons.name: weekly-trends-review
crons.prompt: Create a task for this weekly trends review, mark it in_progress, review the last 7 days of research/output and research/topic-briefings, and write a weekly trends synthesis with repeated themes, strongest sources, missed opportunities, and next actions. When finished, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire weekly-trends-review --interval "0 9 * * 1"

crons.name: research-quality-review
crons.prompt: Create a task for this research quality review, mark it in_progress, read .claude/skills/research-quality-review/SKILL.md, and inspect source failures, noisy sources, duplicate patterns, scoring threshold quality, stale config, and suggested tuning changes. When finished, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire research-quality-review --interval "0 12 * * 5"
